title: cyperus rigens var. rufidulus
intro: Cyperus rigens var. rufidulus, also known as the papyrus sedge, is a type of flowering plant that belongs to the family Cyperaceae. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of this plant include reducing fever, relieving respiratory issues such as bronchitis and asthma, and aiding in the treatment of wounds. The plant can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, and tinctures, and is also used in traditional folk medicine to treat a variety of ailments.
